ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., transistor, diode) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material used in the device (e.g., silicon, germanium) */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device the parameter belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., HEPI, TSILI) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter (e.g., m, Ω−m2) */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value of the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the parameter (e.g., electrical, thermal, mechanical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "operating_conditions" TEXT /* Operating conditions of the scenario (e.g., temperature, voltage) */,
  "environmental_factors" TEXT /* Environmental factors of the scenario (e.g., humidity, pressure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device being simulated */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario being simulated */,
  "result" TEXT /* Simulation result (e.g., current, voltage, power consumption) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., completed, failed, running) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES simulation_scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, run) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_parameter_values" (
  "device_parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device parameter value */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device */,
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the parameter for the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_parameter_values_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_parameter_values_parameter_id FOREIGN KEY ("parameter_id") REFERENCES parameters ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation result */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation */,
  "result" REAL /* Simulation result value */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the simulation result */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission of the role (e.g., view, run, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
